common.name: Name
common.no_players_yet: No players yet — be the first.

layout.supabase_hint: Add VITE_SUPABASE_URL and VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, then redeploy.

home.title: Available matches
home.intro: Book your spot — filter by place or text; turn on “Takap examples” to try the app without a filled database.
home.cache_hint: If this block doesn’t show after deploy: clear cache or use a private window.
home.level_hint: By default all levels are shown. Tap an active level again to show all.
home.city_help: For real matches, the city is detected from the venue text.
home.remote_load_error: Online matches could not be loaded ({{error}}). Takap examples below are still available.
home.remote_detail_error: Match details incomplete ({{detail}}). Usernames / spots may be approximate.
home.no_results_hint: Broaden your search or turn Takap examples back on.

create_match.title: Create a match
create_match.subtitle: Set the date, venue (ideally via Google Places) and price.
create_match.place_hint: Pick a Google suggestion to save GPS (nearby notifications).
create_match.level_help: Sets the expected level to balance the game.
create_match.err_players_range: Max players must be between 2 and 22.
create_match.err_org_participation: Match created but organizer signup failed: {{message}}. Run supabase/organisateur_auto_participation.sql on your project.
create_match.maps_no_key: Without VITE_GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY, type the venue manually (no autocomplete or GPS).
create_match.maps_load_error: Google Maps could not load. Check your API key and allowed domains.

match_detail.org_cannot_book: You’re the organizer — you can’t book your own listing.
match_detail.invite_intro: Send an invite: the player gets a notification. They must open this match and tap “Join” to sign up — no spot is reserved.
match_detail.invite_login_hint: to invite someone (organizer or already signed-up players only).
match_detail.invite_restricted: Only the organizer and already signed-up players can send invites. You’re not in that case yet — join with “Join” or create your own match.
match_detail.complete_hint: You can tap “Match finished” from the scheduled match day onward.
match_detail.results_intro: Stats entered by the organizer — read-only for all participants.
match_detail.stats_intro: Organizer only: goals, assists and cards per signed-up player.
match_detail.rate_intro: Pick a rating per player, then tap “Submit ratings” to save to the notes table. You can’t rate yourself.
match_detail.notes_reload_hint: Saved ratings are reloaded from the server after you submit.
match_detail.alone_no_rate: You were the only signup: there’s no one else to rate.
match_detail.rates_participants_only: Ratings are for players who joined this match.
match_detail.login_for_notes: Log in to view or give ratings if you played.
match_detail.msg_reserved: Spot reserved (simulated: no payment in v1).
match_detail.err_already_in: You’re already signed up for this match.
match_detail.msg_match_done: Match marked finished. Players can rate each other.
match_detail.err_notes_min: Choose at least one rating (1–5 stars) for a player.
match_detail.err_invite_dup: An invite already exists for this player and match.
match_detail.msg_invite_sent: Invite sent: the player gets a notification — they must tap “Join” to sign up (no reserved spot).

chat.title: Chat
chat.participants_only: Chat is for players signed up to this match.
chat.intro: Participant chat — only visible if you’re signed up.
chat.empty: No messages yet. Start the conversation!

leaderboard.title: Top players
leaderboard.empty_tab: No data for this tab yet.

profile.title: My profile
profile.subtitle: Stats and info visible to other players.
profile.admin_sql_hint: If you just set the admin role in SQL, tap here or log in again.
profile.stats_source: “Stats” totals come from match sheets entered by organizers after games.

invite_share.title: Invite friends
invite_share.subtitle: Share your signup link: friends join Takap with your code (no external API).
invite_share.whatsapp_msg:
🎉 Join me on Takap Soccer to organize football matches!

🔗 {{url}}
invite_share.email_body:
Hi!

I’d like you to try Takap Soccer — the app to organize amateur football with friends.

🔗 {{url}}

See you on the pitch!
invite_share.twitter_text: 🎉 Try Takap Soccer! Join me to organize football matches.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.login_prompt: Log in to see your notifications.
notifications.hint_push: OneSignal push as well — tap an unread row to mark it read.
notifications.hint_no_push: Tap an unread notification to mark it as read.
notifications.type_match_invite: You were invited to a match. Open the match and tap “Join”.

auth.just_registered: Account created. If email confirmation is required, confirm it then log in.
auth.register_tagline: Create your account and join matches.
auth.pseudo_min_error: Username must be at least 2 characters.
auth.ref_invite_banner: You're signing up with a friend's invite (code {{code}}).
auth.sponsor_code_help: If a friend shared their code, enter it here (same as in the invite link).
auth.account_created_info: Account created. If email confirmation is enabled on your Supabase project, check your inbox then sign in. Your referral code is saved automatically.

admin.title: Admin — supervision
admin.subtitle: Read-only. Refreshes ~12s or live if Realtime is enabled on Supabase.

players.title: Players
players.intro: Search, filters and comparison. Demo profiles use the same dataset as the home page.
players.community_avg: Community averages (real) — players with at least 1 finished match: rating ~{{note}}/5 · {{matchs}} matches on average.
players.city_label: City (demos; not in DB yet for real profiles)

my_matches.title: My matches (organizer)
my_matches.empty: You haven't created a match yet.

invite_page.subtitle: Your link opens signup with your code in the ?ref= query parameter.
invite_page.why_body: The more of us, the easier it is to organize matches with friends.

ios_push.hint: 📱 To get notifications, add Takap Soccer to your Home Screen: Share → Add to Home Screen

public_profile.recent_ratings_hint: Anonymous aggregate after finished matches — to gauge consistency.
public_profile.community_hint: Averages among players with at least one finished match — useful context.
public_profile.login_compare: Log in to see a direct comparison with your profile.
public_profile.near_community: Close to the Takap community average.
